The delta is -20 (from -382 to -402), which is in the direction of the goal (downwards toward -1000). So direction is consistent: movement is toward the goal, not opposite. Check for implausibly large magnitude: |delta| = 20 < 250, fine. Consistency with vector: T1 atomic, hours, evaluating attitude, small shift. Reasoning addresses the vector mechanism (headline misframing) and profile traits (low openness, tough-mindedness). It does not use generic resistance language; it gives specific reasoning.

Thus, the scores seem plausible and consistent. No rewrite required.
